name: mini-notes-anna-app
description: Mini Notes with LLM Summary — Anna App (storage Host API + Executa sampling tool)

scripts.executa:mock: anna-app executa dev --dir executas/notes-summarizer --mock-sampling fixtures/mock-sampling.jsonl --invoke summarize --args '{"notes":["明天跟客户 follow up","修复登录 bug","Workshop 内容想法"]}'
